manifest.author: thesamim
manifest.description: Sync TickTick tasks to Obsidian, and Obsidian tasks to TickTick
manifest.name: TickTickSync

releases.author: thesamim
releases.description:
## Title: `NewArch2` — Architecture overhaul, feature expansion & maintenance

### Summary
147 files changed (+20,032 / −6,506). Complete re-architecture of the TickTick Sync plugin: Dexie-backed local storage, service-oriented file/repository layer, Dexie-based sync journal, expanded settings, soft-delete lifecycle, tag & link handling improvements, new MkDocs documentation site with GitHub Actions deployment, and numerous bug fixes.

### Highlights

**Architecture & Storage**
- Migrated caching from flat arrays to **Dexie** indexed DB (schema in `src/db/`, migrations in `src/db/migrations.ts`)
- Extracted domain repositories: `TaskRepository`, `FileMetadataService`, `FileTaskQueries`, `ProjectGroupRepository`, `TaskCache`
- New service layer: `EventHandlerService`, `FolderSyncService`, `FolderMigrationService`, `ProjectSyncService`, `VaultSyncCoordinator`, `TaskModificationDetector`, `TaskOperationsService`, `TaskDeletionHandler`, `TagService`
- Removed monolithic `cacheOperation.ts` and old `fileMap.ts`

**New Features**
- **Recurrence processing** (closes #203)
- **Task display visibility controls** — custom rendering for TickTick tasks in reading & edit mode (`src/query/TaskDisplayProcessor.ts`)
- **Granular link hiding** for TickTick tasks in reading & edit mode
- **Sync journal persisted to Dexie**, with modal viewer (`SyncJournalModal`)
- **Device identity & tracking** — mobile device ID capture, device naming in settings
- **Project preservation** — follow TickTick project folder structure
- **Orphan task detection** modal, **found duplicate tasks** modal
- **Conflict resolution** logging (`src/sync/conflicts.ts`)
- **Access control / SSO 2FA login** improvements
- **Soft-delete task lifecycle** — auto-cleanup of deleted tasks after configurable retention period (default 7 days), manual permanent deletion via `CleanupDeletedTasksModal`, recovery via `RecoverDeletedTasksModal`, new `deletedTaskRetentionDays` setting (1–31)
- **Tag handling overhaul** — case-sensitivity respected, sub-tags handled correctly, new `TagService` with comprehensive test coverage
- **Case-insensitive project matching** (via normalized dashes)
- **Task file stickiness on sync** — tasks stay associated with their source file across syncs

**Bug Fixes**
- Resolved task sync loop; wire up file-content duplicate detection
- Fixed cut/paste move task regression (closes #350)
- Preserve reminder fields (closes #264)
- Handle moved tasks edge cases; better link location detection
- Fixed note sync issues (#309, #313)
- Better task item detection; parentage change fixes
- Fixed decorate / rendering of TickTick tasks
- Fixed `plugin.tickTickService` → `plugin.service` call in `TasksSettings.svelte` (broken service reference)
- Replaced browser `fetch()` with Obsidian's `requestUrl()` in `cookie-utils.ts` for proper plugin compatibility
- Tag handling regression fix
- UI regression fix in modals
- Wait for Obsidian Sync to complete before running (closes #233)

**Settings & UI**
- Tabbed settings with `DebugOptions`, `NotesSettings`, `TasksSettings` sections
- `DeviceIdentitySection` for naming mobile devices
- `SyncControlSettings`, `LimitSyncSection`, `FullVaultSyncSection` refinements
- "Manual Operations" tab renamed to **"Maintenance"**
- Improved `LatestChangesModal` text with backup recommendation
- Additional Manage/Recover Deleted Tasks buttons in Maintenance section
- **Ko-fi support button** added to `LatestChangesModal` (callout at top) and docs index/changelog pages
- `LatestChangesModal`: changelog URL points to GitHub Pages instead of wiki; link text uses `innerHTML` for rich formatting; null-safe `resolvePromise` guard in `onClose`

**Documentation**
- New **MkDocs**-based documentation site under `docs-src/` (Material theme) covering getting started, configuration, task format, login, moving tasks, and troubleshooting
- **GitHub Actions workflow** (`.github/workflows/docs.yml`) auto-builds and deploys to `gh-pages` branch on push to `master`
- GitHub Pages replaces the old wiki: README links updated to `https://thesamim.github.io/TickTickSync/`
- Old wiki notion of "reset/checkpoint" removed — directs users to Settings → Maintenance
- Changelog at `docs-src/changelog.md`, synced from `src/notable-changes.ts` (single source of truth)
- Custom nav indentation CSS for nested config pages; Ko-fi button on index page

**Testing**
- Added comprehensive test suite: `RecurrenceConverter.test.ts`, `FileTaskQueries.test.ts`, `TaskCache.test.ts`, `TaskRepository.test.ts`, `VaultSyncCoordinator.test.ts`, `TickTickService.test.ts`, `TagService.test.ts`, conflict tests, journal tests, sync tests, and more
- Updated vitest-setup and test utilities

**Misc**
- NPM audit fix; dependency bumps (vite 6→8, svelte 4→5, js-yaml)
- `capacitor.config.json` added for mobile SSO/2FA login cookie support
- `fake-indexeddb` added for Dexie-backed test environment
- Debug log cleanup
- Removed stale `version.test.ts` and deprecated `suggest.ts`
- Linting cleanup: resolved 2 `no-unsanitized/property` errors in `LatestChangesModal.ts` (DOM API for Ko-fi callout, eslint-suppressed for trusted static content)

## What's Changed
* `NewArch2` — Architecture overhaul, feature expansion & maintenance by @thesamim in https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/358
* Min App Version fix. by @thesamim in https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/360
* New arch2 by @thesamim in https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/362


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/compare/1.1.17...2.0.1

Summary

98 files changed (+13,574 / −4,837). Complete re-architecture of the TickTick Sync plugin with Dexie-backed local storage, service-oriented file/repository layer, expanded settings, and numerous bug fixes.
Highlights

Architecture & Storage

    Migrated caching from flat arrays to Dexie indexed DB (schema in src/db/, migrations in src/db/migrations.ts)
    Extracted domain repositories: TaskRepository, FileMetadataService, FileTaskQueries, ProjectGroupRepository, TaskCache
    New service layer: EventHandlerService, FolderSyncService, FolderMigrationService, ProjectSyncService, VaultSyncCoordinator, TaskModificationDetector, TaskOperationsService, TaskDeletionHandler
    Removed monolithic cacheOperation.ts and old fileMap.ts

New Features

    Recurrence processing (closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/203)
    Task display visibility controls — custom rendering for TickTick tasks in reading & edit mode (src/query/TaskDisplayProcessor.ts)
    Sync journal persisted to Dexie, with modal viewer (SyncJournalModal)
    Device identity & tracking — mobile device ID capture, device naming in settings
    Project preservation — follow TickTick project folder structure
    Orphan task detection modal, found duplicate tasks modal
    Conflict resolution logging (src/sync/conflicts.ts)
    Access control / SSO 2FA login improvements

Bug Fixes

    Resolved task sync loop; wire up file-content duplicate detection
    Fixed cut/paste move task regression (closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/350)
    Preserve reminder fields (closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/264)
    Handle moved tasks edge cases; better link location detection
    Fixed note sync issues (https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/309, https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/313)
    Better task item detection; parentage change fixes
    Fixed decorate / rendering of TickTick tasks

Settings & UI

    Tabbed settings with DebugOptions, NotesSettings, TasksSettings sections
    DeviceIdentitySection for naming mobile devices
    SyncControlSettings, LimitSyncSection, FullVaultSyncSection refinements

Testing

    Added comprehensive test suite: RecurrenceConverter.test.ts, FileTaskQueries.test.ts, TaskCache.test.ts, TaskRepository.test.ts, VaultSyncCoordinator.test.ts, TickTickService.test.ts, conflict tests, journal tests, sync tests, and more
    Updated vitest-setup and test utilities

Misc

    NPM audit fix; dependency bumps (vite, js-yaml)
    README/CHANGELOG updates
    Debug log cleanup (recent uncommitted housekeeping)

* Build(deps-dev): Bump vite from 6.3.6 to 6.4.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/315
* Only Move files with TickTick Tasks on Default Project Folder change by @thesamim in https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/319


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/compare/1.1.16...1.1.17
